Rational of the bucket: This bucket targets members with an open preventive care gap, which is a strong predictor of conversion. The high weight of conversion_rate in the success conditions justifies this slicing axis. Members in this bucket are more likely to take action and schedule an appointment.
Suggested treatment: The SMS for this bucket should emphasize the importance of addressing the open care gap and scheduling an appointment.
SQL: SELECT DISTINCT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile, marketing_ai.care_gaps.measure_name FROM marketing_ai.members JOIN marketing_ai.care_gaps ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.care_gaps.member_id WHERE LOWER(marketing_ai.members.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments WHERE marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE) AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND marketing_ai.members.address_id IN (SELECT address_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses WHERE LOWER(state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions WHERE marketing_ai.member_conditions.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.member_conditions.condition_name) IN ('diabetes', 'hypertension')) AND marketing_ai.care_gaps.measure_category IN ('preventive', 'chronic') AND LOWER(marketing_ai.care_gaps.status) = 'open' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences WHERE marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists WHERE marketing_ai.suppression_lists.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.suppression_lists.channel) = 'sms' AND (marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at IS NULL OR marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE))

Rational of the bucket: This bucket targets members who have recently replied to an SMS, indicating a higher likelihood of engagement and conversion. The moderate weight of open_rate in the success conditions supports this slicing axis.
Suggested treatment: The SMS for this bucket should be personalized and timely, building on the recent interaction.
SQL: SELECT DISTINCT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members WHERE LOWER(marketing_ai.members.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments WHERE marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE) AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND marketing_ai.members.address_id IN (SELECT address_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses WHERE LOWER(state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions WHERE marketing_ai.member_conditions.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.member_conditions.condition_name) IN ('diabetes', 'hypertension')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events WHERE marketing_ai.sms_events.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.sms_events.event_type = 'replied' AND marketing_ai.sms_events.event_timestamp > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences WHERE marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists WHERE marketing_ai.suppression_lists.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.suppression_lists.channel) = 'sms' AND (marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at IS NULL OR marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE))

Rational of the bucket: This bucket targets members with a high propensity score, indicating a higher likelihood of conversion. The high weight of conversion_rate in the success conditions supports this slicing axis.
Suggested treatment: The SMS for this bucket should emphasize the benefits of taking action and scheduling an appointment, leveraging the member's high propensity score.
SQL: SELECT DISTINCT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile, marketing_ai.propensity_scores.score FROM marketing_ai.members JOIN marketing_ai.propensity_scores ON marketing_ai.members.member_id = marketing_ai.propensity_scores.member_id WHERE LOWER(marketing_ai.members.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments WHERE marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE) AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND marketing_ai.members.address_id IN (SELECT address_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses WHERE LOWER(state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions WHERE marketing_ai.member_conditions.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.member_conditions.condition_name) IN ('diabetes', 'hypertension')) AND marketing_ai.propensity_scores.model_name = 'latest_model' AND marketing_ai.propensity_scores.score > 0.7 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences WHERE marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists WHERE marketing_ai.suppression_lists.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.suppression_lists.channel) = 'sms' AND (marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at IS NULL OR marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE))

Rational of the bucket: This bucket targets members with a pending next-best-action related to scheduling an appointment. The high weight of conversion_rate in the success conditions supports this slicing axis.
Suggested treatment: The SMS for this bucket should remind the member to take action and schedule the appointment, leveraging the pending next-best-action.
SQL: SELECT DISTINCT marketing_ai.members.member_id, marketing_ai.members.first_name, marketing_ai.members.last_name, marketing_ai.members.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members WHERE LOWER(marketing_ai.members.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments WHERE marketing_ai.enrollments.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.enrollments.is_active = TRUE) AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND marketing_ai.members.date_of_birth < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND marketing_ai.members.address_id IN (SELECT address_id FROM marketing_ai.addresses WHERE LOWER(state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions WHERE marketing_ai.member_conditions.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.member_conditions.condition_name) IN ('diabetes', 'hypertension')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.next_best_actions WHERE marketing_ai.next_best_actions.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.next_best_actions.action_type = 'schedule_appointment' AND LOWER(marketing_ai.next_best_actions.status) = 'pending') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences WHERE marketing_ai.consent_preferences.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND marketing_ai.consent_preferences.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists WHERE marketing_ai.suppression_lists.member_id = marketing_ai.members.member_id AND LOWER(marketing_ai.suppression_lists.channel) = 'sms' AND (marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at IS NULL OR marketing_ai.suppression_lists.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE))
